question.text: When trades marked as 'INST' by trading members, who can they be allocated to?

answer.text: Only to specified institutional categories within the time specified by Exchanges/CCs
Any client of the trading member

explanation.text: **The Logic:** INST trades can only be allocated to specified institutional categories (Cat I&II FPIs, MFs, banks, insurance, pension funds) within the specified time. **The Trap:** INST code cannot be used for all clients. It is specifically for institutional investors listed by SEBI. **Cross-Exam Context:** Understanding the INST trade flow is important for institutional settlement. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** For FPIs that are corporate bodies/individuals/family, INST facility is not available in the same manner.
